net.sf.saxon.tree.iter

Class EmptyIterator.OfNodes

  • java.lang.Object
    • net.sf.saxon.tree.iter.EmptyIterator
      • net.sf.saxon.tree.iter.EmptyIterator.OfNodes
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    LastPositionFinder, AtomizedValueIterator, SequenceIterator, AxisIterator, GroundedIterator, LookaheadIterator, ReversibleIterator, UnfailingIterator
    Enclosing class:
    EmptyIterator

    public static class EmptyIterator.OfNodes
extends EmptyIterator
implements AxisIterator
    An empty iterator for use where a sequence of nodes is required

      • next

        public NodeInfo next()
        Get the next item.
        Specified by:
        next in interface SequenceIterator
        Specified by:
        next in interface AxisIterator
        Specified by:
        next in interface UnfailingIterator
        Overrides:
        next in class EmptyIterator
        Returns:
        the next item. For the EmptyIterator this is always null.

      • getAnother

        public EmptyIterator.OfNodes getAnother()
        Get another iterator over the same items, positioned at the start.
        Specified by:
        getAnother in interface AtomizedValueIterator
        Specified by:
        getAnother in interface SequenceIterator
        Specified by:
        getAnother in interface AxisIterator
        Specified by:
        getAnother in interface UnfailingIterator
        Overrides:
        getAnother in class EmptyIterator
        Returns:
        another iterator over an empty sequence (in practice, it returns the same iterator each time)
